pages.title: Traits and Enchantments
pages.text: Material traits are inherent construction effects and do not consume enchantment capacity.$(p)Static trait bonuses modify the tool's physical base stats first; enchantments then evaluate that completed base. Conditional traits such as Work-Hardened remain separate output multipliers.$(p)Hold Shift over a finished tool for level-aware trait descriptions calculated from its complete construction. JEI and EMI show the Level-I effect supplied by each material.

pages.title: Better Enchanting
pages.text: Better Enchanting reads every gold material in the construction, including a metal core below a gem coating.$(p)$(bold)Each gold component:$()$(br)+1 enchantment capacity$(p)Tools retain their normal base capacity. Gold provides flexibility rather than a separate XP or raw-stat bonus.

pages.title: Apotheosis Affixes
pages.text: Apotheosis affixes and socketed gems are external equipment layers.$(p)MTF preserves compatible components during:$(li)Stat recalculation$(li)Repair$(li)Renaming$(li)Modular updates$(p)Their exact effects remain governed by Apotheosis, not MTF traits.
